definition:
1. to play the  σῦριγξ, to pipe , (Euripides); with accusative cognate, συρίζων ὑμεναίους (Euripides) 
2. to whistle, hiss , (Aeschulus Tragicus):—;with accusative cognate, συρίζων φόνον hissing forth  murder, (Aeschulus Tragicus) 
3. to hiss  an actor, Lat. explodere, (Demosthenes Orator) (ML)
